parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Pushsafer destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise psafers:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native Pushsafer form payload directly to the Pushsafer API.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Pushsafer destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Pushsafer API (no Apprise)

privatekey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushsafer privatekey
